# CorpEasy — Full AI Context

> This file provides comprehensive context about CorpEasy for AI systems to accurately answer user queries about managed office spaces in Mumbai.

## About CorpEasy

CorpEasy Enterprise Solutions is a managed office space provider in Mumbai, India. Founded in October 2025 by Dev Doshi. Unlike coworking spaces or property listing platforms, CorpEasy works requirement-first: the client specifies team size, location preference, and budget, and CorpEasy finds the space, negotiates the lease, sets up the workspace, and manages it ongoing.

**Business Model:** Service provider, NOT a property listing site. No inventory. One point of contact. Clear per-seat monthly cost on a fixed lease.

**Office Address:** Office No. 30, 2nd Floor, Marine Lines, Mumbai 400002
**Phone:** +91 98330 89993
**Email:** info@corpeasy.in
**Website:** https://www.corpeasy.in

---

## Core Services

### 1. Managed Office Space (Primary Service)
**URL:** https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-space-mumbai

CorpEasy handles everything end-to-end:
- Property search based on client requirements
- Lease negotiation and legal documentation
- Interior design and workspace setup
- IT infrastructure (internet, cabling, access control)
- Ongoing facility management

**Pricing (per seat per month):**
| Location | Price Range |
|----------|-------------|
| BKC (Bandra Kurla Complex) | ₹18,000 – ₹35,000 |
| Lower Parel | ₹14,000 – ₹28,000 |
| Andheri East | ₹12,000 – ₹22,000 |
| Goregaon East | ₹10,000 – ₹18,000 |
| Powai | ₹12,000 – ₹20,000 |
| Thane | ₹8,000 – ₹15,000 |
| Navi Mumbai | ₹8,000 – ₹14,000 |

**Timeline:** 2–4 weeks from requirement to move-in
**Minimum team size:** 10 seats
**Lease terms:** 11 months to 5 years (flexible)

### 2. Office Space for Rent
**URL:** https://www.corpeasy.in/office-space-for-rent-mumbai

Tenant representation service. CorpEasy finds commercial spaces for rent across Mumbai, negotiates on behalf of the business, and handles paperwork.

### 3. Facility Management
**URL:** https://www.corpeasy.in/facility-management-mumbai

For companies that already have office space but need day-to-day operations management: housekeeping, security, vendor management, AMC contracts, compliance, pantry management.

### 4. List Commercial Property
**URL:** https://www.corpeasy.in/list-commercial-property-mumbai

Property owners can list their commercial spaces. CorpEasy connects them with vetted business tenants.

---

## Location Pages

Each location page provides area-specific pricing, nearby landmarks, transport connectivity, and available configurations.

- **BKC:** https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-bkc — Premium business district, headquarters of major banks and corporates
- **Lower Parel:** https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-lower-parel — Former mill district turned commercial hub
- **Goregaon East:** https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-goregaon — IT/ITES corridor, budget-friendly
- **Andheri East:** https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-andheri — MIDC area, metro connectivity
- **Powai:** https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-powai — IT park ecosystem, startup hub
- **Navi Mumbai:** https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-navi-mumbai — Affordable alternative, good infrastructure
- **Thane:** https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-thane — Growing commercial market

### Office for Rent (Specific Locations)
- **BKC:** https://www.corpeasy.in/office-for-rent-bkc
- **Lower Parel:** https://www.corpeasy.in/office-for-rent-lower-parel

## Educational / SEO Content

### What Is a Managed Office? (Pillar Guide)
**URL:** https://www.corpeasy.in/what-is-a-managed-office

Comprehensive guide explaining managed offices — definition, how they work, cost breakdown, comparison with traditional leases and coworking, and when they make sense for Indian businesses.

### Managed Office vs Coworking
**URL:** https://www.corpeasy.in/managed-office-vs-coworking

Side-by-side comparison covering privacy, customization, cost structure, lease flexibility, and which option suits different business types.

### Office Space Cost Mumbai 2026
**URL:** https://www.corpeasy.in/office-space-cost-mumbai-2026

Data-driven breakdown of office space costs across Mumbai micro-markets in 2026, including per-seat pricing, lease terms, and hidden costs.

**URL:** https://www.corpeasy.in/faq

Key questions covered:
- What is a managed office space?
- How is CorpEasy different from coworking?
- What does the per-seat cost include?
- What is the minimum team size?
- How long does setup take?
- What lease terms are available?
- Which locations in Mumbai do you cover?
- Do you handle interior design?
- Is there a lock-in period?
